mapper.select: select b.*,u.username as moderator, (select count(*) from posts p left join boards as b on p.board_id=b.id) as postCount from boards b left join users u on b.moderator_id=u.id
select moderator_id from boards where id=#{boardId}
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET moderator_id = #{moderatorId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{boardId};
